summary: Frontend testing for Score Tracker crash fixes completed successfully. All P0 issues have been verified as fixed. The Score Tracker modal opens correctly, team names and scores can be entered, calculateTotal function works without crashing with partial/empty data, and Send to Presentation button works without crashing.
critical_code_review_comments: calculateTotal() in ScoreTrackerModal.jsx (lines 75-86): Properly validates team object and uses Array.isArray() check for team.rounds with fallback to empty array
getFinalScores() in PresentationMode.jsx (lines 130-213): Validates teams array, roundMode config, and adds bounds checking for multiplier access
handleSendToPresentation() in ScoreTrackerModal.jsx (lines 131-164): Validates teams before sending with robust null checking
handleSendScores() in Editor.jsx (lines 517-580): Validates all input parameters including teams, rounds, and presentation.slides arrays
seed_data_creation: None - used new presentation for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Score Tracker crash fixes have been verified. The app no longer crashes when: 1) Empty teams exist, 2) Teams have partial data (name only, no scores), 3) When clicking Send to Presentation. All round modes (3, 5, 6 rounds) work correctly with proper column display and total calculation.

Round Mode Switching.6_rounds: MC, REG, REG, MISC, MYS(x2), BIG(x3)

No JavaScript Errors.note: Only expected error 'No score slides found in presentation' when testing with new presentation without score slides
